overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting a character riding a horse through the American frontier. The journey traverses a railway embankment, a cliffside dirt path overlooking a valley, a wooden railway bridge spanning a waterfall, and finally opens into golden grasslands.

events.description: horse veers right off the railway tracks onto a narrow dirt path along the cliff edge
horse turns left to rejoin the railway tracks from the dirt path

agents.ego_description: riding a horse along a winding cliffside dirt path, overlooking a wide valley with a distant ranch building

entered.detail: wooden railway ties and steel rails running along the ridge
steep earthen slope supporting the railway
small wooden structure visible in the valley below
dense green trees covering the valley floor
narrow unpaved trail running parallel to the railway along the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a railway embankment high above a valley. The horse immediately turns onto a narrow dirt path running along the cliffside, offering expansive views of the forested valley and a distant ranch. After riding along the cliff edge, the horse turns back to rejoin the railway tracks.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden railway bridge over river gorge

events.description: horse enters the long wooden railway bridge spanning the river gorge
location text 'TANNER'S SPAN' appears at top of screen

agents.ego_description: galloping across a wooden railway trestle bridge with a large waterfall visible to the right

entered.detail: long wooden trestle bridge with open sides spanning the gorge
large cascading waterfall flowing down rocky cliffs into the river
deep canyon with rushing water below the bridge
steep reddish-brown rock face alongside the river

segments.scene_description: The horse rides onto a long wooden railway bridge spanning a dramatic river gorge. To the right, a large waterfall cascades down rocky cliffs into the rushing water below. The location text 'TANNER'S SPAN' appears as the horse continues galloping across the bridge.

events.description: location text 'HENNIGAN'S STEAD' appears at top of screen
horse leaves the railway tracks and veers left into the tall grass field

agents.ego_description: riding through tall golden grass parallel to the railway, heading toward a cluster of oak trees in the distance

entered.detail: expansive field of tall golden-brown grass
large oak trees with dense green canopies dotting the landscape

segments.scene_description: Entering the region labeled 'HENNIGAN'S STEAD', the scene opens into a wide grassland prairie. The horse continues along the railway briefly before veering left into the tall golden grass, riding parallel to the tracks toward distant oak trees and rock formations.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a high cliffside railway embankment into a wide, sun-drenched grassland prairie. It begins with the horse turning from the tracks onto a narrow dirt path along a cliff edge, overlooking a forested valley and a distant ranch before looping back to the railway. As the horse continues, the terrain shifts to a long wooden railway bridge spanning a dramatic river gorge, where a large waterfall cascades down rocky cliffs beside the path. The scene then opens from the bridge into the expansive plains of Hennigan's Stead, with the lighting brightening as the horse veers left away from the tracks. Finally, the movement carries the rider through tall golden grass toward distant oak trees and rock formations under an open sky.
